creator: ferdinand.goldmann@jku.at
text:
I just experienced the very same problem trying to install from
FreeBSD-8.2-BETA1-amd64-bootonly.iso. After entering the FTP installation 
options, the system would respond with "cannot resolve hostname 
ftp.at.freebsd.org".

I tried both DHCP and static IP - with the same result.

The system I tried to install is an HP DL360 G7.

I ended up installing from FreeBSD-8.1-RELEASE-amd64-bootonly.iso, which 
worked without any problems.

So, this bug still seems to exist ... :-(

-- 
 >> Ferdinand Goldmann
 >> Johannes Kepler University Linz - Server Systems/Information Management
